scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:ts
scripts.test: npm run build:ts && node tests\card-art.mjs && node tests\ai-identification.mjs && node tests\deck-selection.mjs && node tests\worker-activation.mjs && node tests\reading-concise.mjs && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tests\monetization-config.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tests\journal-ui.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tests\reading-actions.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tests\homepage-ui.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tests\app-shell-ui.ps1
